verdict_reason: Layout migration to block pageContent + govuk-grid-column-full is behaviour-preserving and matches the parent layout; only a minor hardcoded-heading drift nit.

todos.issue: appHeading hardcodes heading: "Search for a place of destination", duplicating the controller's pageTitle value; the old code passed the pageTitle variable, so the <title> and h1 can now drift if the controller string changes
todos.fix: Pass the context variable instead: appHeading({ pageTitle: "Address", heading: pageTitle })
